channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Red River 动画 Casts Minami Takayama, Kazuhiko Inoue as Yuri的 Parents
item.description: Takayama, Inoue previously played main pair Yuri, Kail in drama CD for manga ― The official website for the television anime of Chie Shinohara's Red River (Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori) shōjo manga... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Red River Anime Casts Minami Takayama, Kazuhiko Inoue as Yuri's Parents

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Yoroi-Shinden Samurai Troopers Anime的 2nd Part Casts Hina Suguta
item.description: Suguta plays new DST commander ― The staff for Yoroi Shin Den Samurai Troopers, the new sequel anime of the Yoroiden Samurai Troopers series, confirmed on Wednesday that it has cast Hina Suguta as... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Yoroi-Shinden Samurai Troopers Anime's 2nd Part Casts Hina Suguta

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network 新作 Ghost Shell 动画 Confirms Japanese 声优阵容

item.title: [动画][开播] Anime News Network Everyday Host 动画 Sequel Series 开播 January 2027
item.description: Musical stage play also announced ― The staff for the short anime of Nimo Gotō's Everyday Host four-panel manga announced on Tuesday that the anime's sequel series will begin airing in January 2027.... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Everyday Host Anime Sequel Series to Premiere in January 2027

item.title: Anime News Network Japanese Animation TV Ranking, June 22-28
item.description: Detective Conan ranked #1 over Sazae-san last week ― Title Station Date Time Length Average Household Rating Detective Conan NTV June 27 (Sat) 18:00 30 min. 7.4 Sazae-san Fuji TV June 28 (Sun) 18:30... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, June 22-28
